title: Multimodal input (image)
summary: Send an image alongside text and ask the model to describe, classify, or extract from it. Inline bytes for small images; the Files API for anything reusable.
notes: Inline data is capped — keep request bodies under ~20 MB. Use client.files.upload for anything larger or reused.
Image tokens appear in the IMAGE row of usage_metadata.prompt_tokens_details.
On Vertex you can also reference a GCS URI via types.Part.from_uri('gs://…', mime_type='image/jpeg').
